data.user_prompt: Where can someone get mental health case management in Louisville, KY?
data.system_message: Answer as a local-search assistant for a person in Louisville, Kentucky. Prefer current local providers and cite source URLs when available.
data.tag: lmhg llm response claude Where can someone get mental health case management in Louisville, KY?

sections.text:
Here is a rundown of local providers offering **mental health case management** in Louisville, KY:

---

### 1. 🏥 Louisville Mental Health Group
**Website:** [louisvillementalhealth.org/case-management](https://louisvillementalhealth.org/case-management/)

Their case management services go beyond traditional therapy to help you access essential resources and achieve stability. They assist with housing, employment, medical care, transportation, and other community-based services, and their case managers act as advocates and coordinators.

annotations.title: Case Management – Louisville Mental Health Group

sections.text: They accept most commercial insurances, all Medicaid plans, and private pay.

annotations.title: Mental Health Clinic In Louisville | Louisville Mental Health Group

sections.text:
---

### 2. 🏥 Step By Step Family Services
**Address:** 2900 W Broadway St, Suite 015, Louisville, KY 40211
**Website:** [stepbystepfamilyservices.org](https://stepbystepfamilyservices.org/)

Home and community-based targeted case management services consist of comprehensive, individualized, and strength-based behavioral treatment plans based upon collaborative assessed needs of the client and family.

annotations.title: Step By Step Family Services - Mental Health, Case Management

sections.text: Services may be covered in full or in part by health insurance, Medicaid, or an Employee Assistance Plan (EAP), with a private pay fee schedule for the uninsured based on income.

annotations.title: Step By Step Family Services - Mental Health, Case Management

sections.text:
---

### 3. 🏥 Best Life Mental Health Services, LLC
**Website:** [bestlifelouisville.com/case-management](https://www.bestlifelouisville.com/case-management/)

The purpose of case management for mental health is to make it easier for a person or family to determine what services are available to them and how to take advantage of them — and at Best Life Louisville, a Targeted Case Manager will help you find and use those resources.

annotations.title: Targeted Case Management - Best Life Mental Health Services, LLC

sections.text: This includes finding and connecting with community support associates, therapeutic groups, and occupational therapy, as well as accessing community services including health and dental care, housing assistance, and SNAP benefits.

annotations.title: Targeted Case Management - Best Life Mental Health Services, LLC

sections.text: Kentucky's largest counseling center serves Louisville, Lexington, and the entire state with therapy, psychiatry, and case management.

annotations.title: Mental Health Counseling and Psychiatry | Kentucky Counseling Center

sections.text: Case managers are mental health professionals trained to connect you with financial, educational, employment, and health resources within your community — though you must have a qualifying diagnosis and Medicaid benefits for program eligibility.

annotations.title: Mental Health Counseling and Psychiatry | Kentucky Counseling Center

sections.text:
---

### 5. 🏥 Family Health Centers
**Multiple Locations** (Portland Ave, E Broadway, Southside Dr, Fairdale, Taylor Blvd, Muhammad Ali Blvd, W Market St)
**Website:** [fhclouisville.org](https://www.fhclouisville.org/health_services/counseling-services/)

Family Health Centers offers case management as part of their counseling services, with counselors working with you and your medical provider to evaluate your mental health needs and develop a plan of action.

Case managers coordinate communication between therapists, doctors, social workers, legal counselors, and others to make sure medical, social, and therapeutic needs are met — with services available both in-person and remotely.

annotations.title: Case management – Kentucky Mental Health Care

sections.text:
---

### 7. 🏥 Baptist Health Louisville – Behavioral Health
**Address:** 4000 Kresge Way, Louisville, KY 40207

annotations.title: Mental Health Facilities in Louisville, KY | MentalHealthFacilities.net

fan_out_queries: mental health case management Louisville KY
